title: BackWalks
body:
# BackWalks

BackWalks forces all players to move backward at all times, this plugin is for **__Bukkit, Spigot, and Paper__** and doesn't allow players to move sideways even slightly. If the player moves any more than 20° from backward they will instantly die, this includes hitting blocks and moving sideways as a result, or momentum/being pushed by mobs or water. If the player is in _CREATIVE_ or _SPECTATOR_ mode, they will be unaffected by this plugin (allowing for moderation).

## Installation Guide
To install this plugin you must be running Spigot Bukkit or Paper, then once you have run the server once to create your main directories you can simply drag and drop it into "plugins" and after a restart or reload, it is ready to go out of the box, enter a boat and you're away.

## Lisencing
BackWalks is a completely open-source project under the MIT license and all the code can be found through the **External Resources** tab on the side panel, or via the link below.

## Additional Links
[Download](https://modrinth.com/plugin/backwalks/versions) exclusive to Modrinth can be found here.

[Source Code](https://github.com/tnn1nja/backwalks) can be found here.

[Issue Tracker](https://github.com/tnn1nja/backwalks/issues) if you want to report any bugs you can do so here.

[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@tnn1nja) you can find more from me here.
